TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: lami liyaw a lami nua caucau a sepayuan, izua va'u, vasa, djulis, vurati, vuday, taruimu katua paday. salang a icu a salang papizuanan a remukuz tua mareka lami. vurasi na masan pazangal a lami a vurasi. semankubav pinizuan a peneljuq tua lami a salang. semankubav itjen tuatja pizuanan tua lami.
S.PHON: ɭami ɭijaw a ɭami nua ʦauʦau a səpajuan, izua vaʔu, vasa, ɉuɭis, vurati, vudaj, taruimu katua padaj. saɭaŋ a iʦu a saɭaŋ papizuanan a rəmukuz tua marəka ɭami. vurasi na masan pazaŋaɭ a ɭami a vurasi. səmankubav pinizuan a pənəʎuq tua ɭami a saɭaŋ. səmankubav iʦən tuaʦa pizuanan tua ɭami.
S.FORM: lami liyaw a lami nua caucau a sepayuan, izua va'u, vasa, djulis, vurati, vuday, taruimu katua paday. salang a icu a salang papizuanan a remukuz tua mareka lami. vurasi na masan pazangal a lami a vurasi. semankubav pinizuan a peneljuq tua lami a salang. semankubav itjen tuatja pizuanan tua lami.
S.PHON: ɭami ɭijaw a ɭami nua ʦauʦau a səpajuan, izua vaʔu, vasa, ɉuɭis, vurati, vudaj, taruimu katua padaj. saɭaŋ a iʦu a saɭaŋ papizuanan a rəmukuz tua marəka ɭami. vurasi na masan pazaŋaɭ a ɭami a vurasi. səmankubav pinizuan a pənəʎuq tua ɭami a saɭaŋ. səmankubav iʦən tuaʦa pizuanan tua ɭami.
